note: Bundled sample data for offline/demo use. Real EU acts and communications (metadata summarised by the BioFairNet team, not official abstracts). The live tier queries EUR-Lex/CELLAR directly; the finder-data GitHub Action writes a fresher snapshot to policies.json.

items.title: The European Green Deal (COM/2019/640 final)
items.summary: Communication setting the EU strategy for climate neutrality by 2050: emission reduction, clean energy, circular economy, biodiversity restoration, farm to fork, zero pollution and a just transition that leaves no region behind.

items.title: European Climate Law — Regulation (EU) 2021/1119
items.summary: Makes the 2050 climate-neutrality objective legally binding, sets the 2030 target of at least 55 % net greenhouse-gas emission reduction and frames carbon removals, adaptation and just transition monitoring.

items.title: A new Circular Economy Action Plan for a cleaner and more competitive Europe (COM/2020/98 final)
items.summary: Action plan on circular economy: sustainable product design, waste prevention, recycling, secondary raw materials, packaging, plastics, textiles, construction and the bioeconomy as a driver of resource efficiency and CO2 mitigation.

items.title: A sustainable Bioeconomy for Europe: strengthening the connection between economy, society and the environment (COM/2018/673 final)
items.summary: Updated EU Bioeconomy Strategy: scaling bio-based sectors, biomass mobilisation within ecological boundaries, biorefineries, rural and coastal development, and deployment of local bioeconomies across carbon-intensive regions.

items.title: Renewable Energy Directive (EU) 2018/2001 (RED II)
items.summary: Binding EU renewable energy framework: renewable electricity, heating and transport targets, sustainability and greenhouse-gas criteria for biomass and biofuels, guarantees of origin and support schemes.

items.title: Just Transition Fund — Regulation (EU) 2021/1056
items.summary: Establishes the Just Transition Fund supporting territories most affected by the transition to climate neutrality: diversification of carbon-intensive regions, reskilling of workers, clean energy investment and circular economy projects.

items.title: A Farm to Fork Strategy for a fair, healthy and environmentally-friendly food system (COM/2020/381 final)
items.summary: Strategy for sustainable food systems: pesticide and nutrient reduction, organic farming, sustainable livestock, food waste, carbon farming and bio-based fertilisers linking agriculture to climate mitigation.

items.title: EU Biodiversity Strategy for 2030 — Bringing nature back into our lives (COM/2020/380 final)
items.summary: Protects and restores ecosystems: protected areas, forest and soil restoration, pollinators, nature-based solutions and biodiversity-friendly bioeconomy value chains.

items.title: Directive (EU) 2018/851 amending the Waste Framework Directive
items.summary: Strengthens waste hierarchy and recycling targets, extended producer responsibility, separate collection of bio-waste and measures for waste prevention and secondary raw materials in a circular economy.

items.title: New EU Forest Strategy for 2030 (COM/2021/572 final)
items.summary: Forest protection, restoration and sustainable management: afforestation, carbon sinks, cascading use of woody biomass, forest-based bioeconomy and payments for ecosystem services.

items.title: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism — Regulation (EU) 2023/956
items.summary: Puts a carbon price on imports of carbon-intensive goods (cement, iron and steel, aluminium, fertilisers, electricity, hydrogen) to prevent carbon leakage and support global emission reduction.

items.title: Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (EU) 2024/1781
items.summary: Framework for sustainable product requirements: durability, reparability, recycled content, carbon and environmental footprints, digital product passports supporting circular economy business models.

items.title: Union certification framework for permanent carbon removals, carbon farming and carbon storage in products — Regulation (EU) 2024/3012
items.summary: First EU-wide certification of carbon removals: permanent storage, carbon farming on agricultural soils and forests, and carbon storage in long-lived bio-based products, with monitoring and liability rules.

items.title: Net-Zero Industry Act — Regulation (EU) 2024/1735
items.summary: Scales EU manufacturing of net-zero technologies: solar, wind, batteries, heat pumps, electrolysers, carbon capture and storage, with permitting acceleration, net-zero valleys and skills academies.

items.title: Proposal for a Directive on Soil Monitoring and Resilience (COM/2023/416 final)
items.summary: Establishes soil health monitoring across the EU, sustainable soil management principles and remediation of contaminated sites, linking soil carbon to climate mitigation and food security.
